title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Voltas

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Voltas
jsonLd.description:
We at Voltas are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Voltas:
Voltas is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Voltas!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
